severity_rationale: Typhoon-driven surface flooding to knee height; corrugated-iron roof panels airborne; one elderly resident sheltering on a second-floor balcony signalling for help.
immediate_action: Coordinate boat rescue for the second-floor elderly resident. Do not enter water — power line is in it. Establish 30 m downwind cordon for debris.
routing_rationale: One trapped + compound hazards (wind, water, electrical).
